name: withania somnifera (ashwagandha)
interactions: Potential additive sedation with CNS depressants
safetyNotes: May cause alcohol or or other cns depressants. Caution: safety evidence is limited or inconsistent. Avoid combining with sedatives.
dosage: Common adult use is 300-600 mg/day of root extract standardized to withanolides.
